Entry.JapaneseText: しかし、まさかこの地上を 魔族が支配していたなんてな
Entry.EnglishText: All said and done... I can't believe the surface rightfully belongs to the Daemonium...

Entry.JapaneseText: それってそんなに大変なことか？
だって、人間じゃない人たちが世界に たくさんいたなんてなんか変な感じがして……
Entry.EnglishText: Just the thought of a lot of inhuman creatures habiting the world makes me skin crawl...

Entry.JapaneseText: でも、今は人間がこの世界の一番だけど、 そうじゃない時代とかもあったんだぜ
Entry.EnglishText: Think of it this way, right now humans are the dominant species in the world. However, in a different era that might not have been the case at all.

Entry.JapaneseText: 何億年も前はまだ形のないマナ生物とかが 海の中にうようよしてただけだし
Entry.EnglishText: Millions of years ago when Mana still had no form the sea was swarming with all kinds of different creatures.

Entry.JapaneseText: その後のすっげー長い間は地上を何千メートルもある でっけードラゴンが支配してたんだぜ？
Entry.EnglishText: After that they had thousands of years to race who-knows-how-many-thousands of meters to the surface. In that era, maybe giant Dragons were dominating the earth?

Entry.JapaneseText: だから、例え一時期でも、魔族が世界を 支配していた時期があってもおかしくない、か……
Entry.EnglishText: If you follow that line of thought, it isn't unbelievable to imagine at some point the Daemonium denizens were the dominant species...

Entry.JapaneseText: <Dio>の考え方もある意味、 正しいとも言えるな
Entry.EnglishText: <Dio>'s example is the correct way to think of this situation, I believe.

Entry.JapaneseText: そう、なのかな…… わたしはなんか違う気がするんですけど……
Entry.EnglishText: Is that so...? Still, for some reason I'm not ok with that idea...
